title: 金鯱賞の後に・『運の尽き』

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait... I lost? How could that be?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What could have happened? Wasn't luck working
in my favor? Just... what?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This can't be right. It has to be a trick. I mean,
this can't really be happening. I have a destiny...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What's going on, Trainer? I must still be asleep. This is all just a terrible nightmare, right?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It can't be real! I thought I'd been reborn... This
means I haven't changed one bit...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Where has my luck gone?! Is it in hibernation or
something?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wake up! Please, I'm begging you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If the gods have deserted me, then what should
I... I... Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A worried Silence Suzuka tries comforting her,
but I gently turn her down, sensing this isn't the
right time. Matikanefukukitaru continues to cry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that our next goal is the Takarazuka
Kinen. She doesn't respond.
